entities.child_1: a girl in a purple jacket
entities.child_2: a boy in an orange shirt
entities.dog: a black and white border collie

scenes.title: The Park
scenes.background_prompt: A sunny park with a wooden seesaw on a grassy area, a paved path, a few trees with green leaves, and a bright blue sky. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A sunny park on a bright day. Two children play on a wooden seesaw on a grassy area. A girl in a purple jacket with a zipper and brown leggings sits on the left side of the seesaw, which is lifted high in the air, and she laughs with her hands gripping the handle. A boy in an orange shirt and gray shorts sits on the right side, which is touching the ground, and he pushes off with his feet to launch the other side up. A black and white border collie sits on the paved path a few meters away, its tongue out, watching the children with an alert, happy expression and its tail wagging. High in the bright blue sky, a red diamond-shaped kite with a long white tail soars above the trees, its string barely visible. A few leafy green trees line the edge of the park, and the grass is vibrant green.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place child_1 on the left side of the seesaw, lifted high, laughing with hands gripping handle. Place child_2 on the right side touching the ground, pushing off with feet. Place dog on the paved path a few meters away, sitting with tongue out, watching and wagging tail. Place kite high in the sky above the trees.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, several yellow and white flowers grow in a lush green field. A stone path made of grey rounded rocks winds from the bottom left corner toward the center of the scene. Sitting on this path is a dog, a black and white border collie with its tongue hanging out, looking toward the right. To the right of the path, child_1, a girl with curly brown hair wearing a yellow hat, a purple jacket, brown pants, and brown boots, sits on the left end of a wooden seesaw. She is laughing and holding onto the wooden handles. A thin string extends from her hand up to a red diamond-shaped kite with white trailing ribbons flying in the upper center of the sky. The wooden seesaw is brown and rests on a central wooden pivot. On the right end of the seesaw sits child_2, a boy with short brown hair wearing an orange t-shirt, blue shorts, and brown shoes. He has a neutral or slightly sad expression and holds onto the handles. In the bottom right corner, there are purple and white flowers. Behind the characters, the landscape consists of rolling green hills and several large trees with thick brown trunks and rounded green canopies. One tree is on the far left, another is in the center-left, and a third is on the far right. The background features a bright blue sky filled with soft, white, puffy clouds, suggesting a sunny daytime setting. The dog is positioned to the left of child_1, while child_2 is on the far right of the playground equipment. The kite is positioned above and between the two children.
